User.title: User
User.description: User profile, configuration, and offline-synced state.

personality.description: The chosen sassy personality profile of Mayra (sarcastic, sweetheart, fiesty).

chatHistory.description: Recent conversations in chat and voice.

Memory.title: Memory
Memory.description: Long-term key-value fact stored in Mayra's Power Memory Card.

fact.description: The specific statement or fact remembered about the user.

category.description: The category of the memory (e.g., personal, preferences, commands).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the memory was registered.

userId.description: The UID of the user this memory belongs to.

users/{userId}/memories/{memoryId}.description: Individual long-term facts stored in the Power Memory Card.
